welcome.ecosystemDescription: Laravel has an incredibly rich ecosystem.
welcome.suggestion: We suggest starting with the following.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to your account to manage your repair tickets
login.heroSubtitle: Submit repair requests, track progress, and communicate with certified mechanics - all in one place.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Join OnlyFix and start managing your car repairs efficiently
register.heroSubtitle: Whether you're a car owner seeking repairs or a mechanic managing work orders, OnlyFix streamlines the entire process.
register.termsNotice: By creating an account, you agree to our

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area. Please confirm your password before continuing.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you?
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Please confirm access to your account by entering the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.

profile.title: Profile information
profile.description: Update your name and email address
profile.resendVerification: Click here to resend the verification email.
profile.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

password.title: Update password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add additional security to your account using two factor authentication

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteAccount.warningText: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

auth.defaultHeroSubtitle: Streamline your auto repair workflow with our comprehensive ticketing system. Connect customers with mechanics efficiently.

features.quickTicket: Quick ticket creation for car issues
